retry_reason: Putting a reference is a final operation; retrying would be a double-put (use-after-free).
contract_summary: Put wrapper that decrements the refcount of a batadv_tt_local_entry via kref_put. The entry is passed as a pointer; if NULL, the function is a no-op. After calling, the caller must not use the entry. If the refcount reaches zero, the entry is freed via batadv_tt_local_entry_release. No return value or error handling is needed; the caller should not retry on failure (failure indicates invalid state or double-free).
